parameters.query: =WITH lead AS (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE (lower(linkedin_url) = '{{$json.linkedin_url}}' AND '{{$json.linkedin_url}}' <> '') OR (email IS NOT NULL AND lower(email) = lower('{{$json.email}}')) LIMIT 1) INSERT INTO demo_bookings (lead_id, demo_date, status, notes) SELECT lead.id, '{{$json.starts_at}}'::timestamptz, 'scheduled', 'event:{{$json.event_uri}}' FROM lead RETURNING id, lead_id;
=UPDATE demo_bookings SET demo_date = '{{$json.starts_at}}'::timestamptz, status = 'scheduled' WHERE notes = 'event:{{$json.reschedule_uid || $json.event_uri}}';
=UPDATE campaigns SET demos_booked = demos_booked + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{$env.ACTIVE_CAMPAIGN_ID}}';

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: =✅ New demo booked: {{$('Function — extract booking').item.json.name}} ({{$('Function — extract booking').item.json.email}}) on {{$('Function — extract booking').item.json.starts_at}}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: =❌ Demo cancelled: {{$('Function — extract booking').item.json.name}} ({{$('Function — extract booking').item.json.email}}) — was scheduled for {{$('Function — extract booking').item.json.starts_at}}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: =🔄 Demo rescheduled: {{$('Function — extract booking').item.json.name}} ({{$('Function — extract booking').item.json.email}}) — new slot: {{$('Function — extract booking').item.json.starts_at}}
